## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and next steps for CVE vulnerability pages and CWE blog series for FOSSA's website.](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CVE pages: GrowthX to provide content template and data sources; FOSSA to grant GitHub access for staging/preview](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [CWE blogs: 10 articles completed, under review; code snippets to be checked by GrowthX engineer](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Next steps: Aida to finalize data sources and content template for CVE pages, sync with Marcus, and update FOSSA team](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

## Topics

### CVE Vulnerability Pages Development

  - [GrowthX to create individual pages for each vulnerability](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Content generation: Need to decide on data sources (e.g., GitHub API) and what information to pull programmatically](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Page design: Aim for speed over complexity; should match FOSSA's dark mode brand](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Publishing process: Initially using markdown files, with potential for more advanced components later](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [FOSSA to provide GitHub repo access for staging/preview of pages](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### Technical Requirements and Workflow

  - [FOSSA's website: Static pages managed through GitHub, mostly in Markdown](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [No current CMS, but API flexibility available](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver pages into the repo after finalizing structure and design](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Marcus (GrowthX) confident in handling technical aspects of publishing](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

### Content Generation and Data Sources

  - [Aida found potential GitHub doc accessible via API for CVE information](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Goal: Combine multiple data sources for comprehensive CVE pages](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Next step: GrowthX to define data sources and generate content for each page](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Aida to create content mock-up and template for review](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### CWE Blog Series Progress

  - [10 CWE blog articles completed, currently under review by Aida](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Code snippets in articles to be reviewed by Marcus (GrowthX engineer)](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [FOSSA facing challenges in publishing series due to lack of CMS, but working on it](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to finalize data sources and create content template for CVE pages](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up GitHub branch for CVE page development and preview](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Aida to share CVE page mock-up with Marcus ASAP, aiming for next week](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Aida to complete CWE blog review and send code snippets to Marcus for technical review](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [FOSSA to provide GitHub access for GrowthX team to work on staging environment](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Aida to sync with Marcus internally and provide next steps to FOSSA team by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/FZJWKpZo7yaThYgFCYn7ngB2Y2xd-sp1?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
